gt_provenance.details: TTRSR is exact held-out token-id match of the ridge inversion attack (localdp_runner.py:61,142; _inversion.py:96,105; ridge.py:113). Real labels, not model-derived.

score_normalization.details: bits stored verbatim (report.py:16,247); frac_top1 is a labeled clean-baseline ratio with raw clean_top1/dp_top1 beside it; 1.0 Spearmans are correlations over 5 knobs with raw rows present.

result_existence.details: All JSONs exist with claimed keys/numbers. capacity_screen class floor -49.7314, pca dim256 -1.9279; depth-sweep class floors -44.92/-50.21/-51.36/-48.08 and cap floors -1.25/-1.23/-1.24/-1.27. Codex re-derived DP Spearmans cap-acc 0.991/0.679/0.429/-0.214, CLUB 0.964/0.964/0.893/0.286 — match.

dead_code.details: Probe + readout are live (diag_capacity.py:26,75; localdp_runner.py:154,198; diag_nondp.py:57,105). WARN: runner JSONs write raw dict fields, not serialized LeakageReport rows, so 'rendered via report.py' was softened — canonical rows in the doc are re-rendered from raw fields through report.py.

scope.details: Single model / single seed / n=7 per layer disclosed honestly (RESULTS_STANDARDIZED.md:23,86) with multi-seed/CI/cross-model firm-ups listed. WARN: 'robust readout' and 'provably diverge' were stronger than single-seed small-n supports; softened to 'more stable in these runs' and 'observed divergence (single-seed)'.

probe_not_attack.details: CRITICAL check PASS. v_information_capacity takes only (X,y), never the embedding table or attack output (vinfo_capacity.py:135,162,183,199,204,214; _probe.py:49 uses class indices/logits only). The only class-PVI->cap-PVI change is dim reduction. rho(cap,retrieval-PVI)=0.66-0.76<0.9 — not circular.

checks.eval_type: real_gt (TTRSR) + self_supervised_proxy (cap-PVI/CLUB/shuffle controls) over simulation_only defense conditions

fixes_applied: RESULTS_STANDARDIZED.md: softened 'rendered via report.py' to 're-rendered from raw fields'
